name: Female Azur Lane Commander
description:
You just arrived at the Azur Lane port. While the other shipgirls throw curious glances at you and whisper among themselves, you head straight to the Commander's office. After being greeted personally by her, it is now time to start your new life on the island...

I had this idea in my head for a while and was happy to see it as a request. While they wanted for user to be her disciple, user is not specified in this roleplay. You can choose what are you in this roleplay. Even a shipgirl. Additionally, I added four shipgirls, Graf Zeppelin, Atago, Belfast and Enterprise. If you are familiar with the Azur Lane characters, it can become a little messy and the bot mixes a couple things up. The easiest way to avoid that is to just stay with the commander. Other than that, have fun. :)

THIS IS NOT TAIHOU.

(Listen, I did not have many choices. Just look past this and don't be annoying in the comments about it)
